response.original_title: Háblame de la muerte, háblame de su muerte.
response.overview: I must hear how people depart while I am left to wait for death to grant me my place; not as a complaint, not as a prayer, but as a perpetual waiting whose arrival no one awaits
response.tagline: I am to watch you depart, while I die each day, I am to watch you depart.
response.title: Háblame de la muerte, háblame de su muerte.
